name: vinuni_identity_intent_audit
description: Phase 1.28/D9 intent-satisfaction auditor: identity/role questions where a GROUNDED answer can still name the wrong-role person (the data overloads 'President': Council-President = Lê Mai Lan vs Rector = Rohit Verma 2021 / Tan Yap Peng 2025). With ENABLE_INTENT_AUDIT, role-enumeration + role-mismatch answers must HEDGE instead of confidently listing wrong people, while individual 'who is X' must still ANSWER (no over-degradation) and policy 'who is eligible' must not be gated. NOTE: the enumeration cases expect a HEDGE for now (safe given the data); once the leadership content + entity/role table (D8) land, flip them to required_facts=[Rohit Verma, Tan Yap Peng]. Authored from live v2 probes, not the bot's output.

cases.question: Who have served as the Rectors (Hiệu trưởng) of VinUniversity over time?
VinUni đã có những hiệu trưởng nào qua các thời kỳ?
Who is the Rector (Hiệu trưởng) of VinUniversity?
Who is Rohit Verma at VinUniversity?
Who is eligible for the Vingroup scholarship?
